plan.description: A full-stack application to manage a list of to-do items using a Flask REST API and a vanilla JavaScript frontend.
plan.architecture: Client-Server architecture. The frontend (Vanilla JS) communicates with the backend (Flask REST API) via REST endpoints. Data persistence is handled by SQLite via SQLAlchemy.

files.purpose: Central configuration file for the application (e.g., database URI, secret key).
Defines the SQLAlchemy database model for Todo items.
Contains the API logic (CRUD operations) for Todo items using Flask routes.
The main Flask application entry point, initializing the app and registering blueprints.
The main HTML structure for the application, linking CSS and JavaScript.
Handles all frontend logic: fetching data from the API, rendering the list, and handling user input.

build_steps: Setup virtual environment and install dependencies.
Initialize database models and run migrations.
Connect frontend to backend API and test functionality.

subtasks.name: Setup Configuration and Database Models
subtasks.description: Establish the core settings and define the data structure.

subtasks.name: Implement Backend API
subtasks.description: Create the Flask application structure and implement the REST endpoints for Todo items.

subtasks.name: Build Frontend Structure and Logic
subtasks.description: Create the basic HTML layout and implement the vanilla JS logic for interaction.

subtasks.name: Connect and Test Full Stack
subtasks.description: Ensure the frontend correctly calls the backend API endpoints and displays the data.
